title: Senior SEO Specialist at Hopscotch International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Hopscotch International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Hopscotch International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Hopscotch International Enterprises:
Hopscotch International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hopscotch International Enterprises!
